image.description: The reference image to use for structural guidance. The edges and layout of this image will guide the output composition.

prompt.description: Text describing the desired output image content and style.

negative_prompt.description: Text describing elements to exclude from the output image.

control_strength.description: Controls how closely the output follows the reference structure. Higher values produce outputs more faithful to the reference layout.

seed.description: A value to control randomness in generation.

output_format.description: The output format of the generated image.
